commit_scope: feat(field): record view attribution CC flow receipts

local_validation.details: Added POST /api/field-stories/{slug}/view-attribution, GET /api/field-stories/{slug}/view-attribution/{event_hash}, and GET /api/field-stories/{slug}/view-attribution-circulation. Focused test records an lc-network -> Spellmonger view, persists a compact receipt, writes 6 CC flow rows, mirrors flow into contribution ledger, verifies creator:Terry Mancour receives 0.4 CC, and reads flowing circulation/vitality summary. Full api/tests/test_field_story_trace_index.py passed with 11 tests.

ci_validation.details: Local API field-story trace tests passed; CI will rerun after PR.

deploy_validation.details: API endpoint change is ready for normal PR/deploy flow; public API calls will be verified after merge.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Public field-story trace views can persist compact attribution receipts and CC flow rows, then expose circulation sensing without copying raw traces into each view.
test_flows: POST lc-network -> Spellmonger view attribution with cc_amount=1.0
GET creator:Terry Mancour ledger and confirm field_view_flow amount_cc=0.4
GET circulation summary and confirm flowing circulation/vitality signals
